text:
Defending champions Team USA take on Olympic debutants South Sudan in Group C at Pierre Mauroy Stadium.

Save

Share

This blog is now closed, thanks for joining us. These were the updates on the 2024 Paris Olympics Group C men’s basketball game between USA and South Sudan on Wednesday, July 31.
